languages.text: "У меня есть дела поважнее, чем принимать благодарности черни. Уберите их отсюда сейчас же".

traits.locale_text: "У меня есть дела поважнее, чем принимать благодарности черни. Уберите их отсюда сейчас же".

languages.text: "I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."
languages.original_text: "У меня есть дела поважнее, чем принимать благодарности черни. Уберите их отсюда сейчас же".

traits.locale_text: "I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."
"I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."
"I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."

languages.text: 「民衆の感謝を受けるよりも、もっと重要な事柄を処理しなければなりません。彼らを即座に退けろ」
languages.original_text: "I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."

languages.text: "Ayaktakımının minnettarlığını kabul etmekten daha önemli işlerim var. Derhâl uzaklaştırın şunları."
languages.original_text: "I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Ayaktakımının minnettarlığını kabul etmekten daha önemli işlerim var. Derhâl uzaklaştırın şunları."

languages.text: “比起接受贱民的谢恩，我还有更重要的事务需处理。即刻遣散他们。”
languages.original_text: "I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."

traits.locale_text: “比起接受贱民的谢恩，我还有更重要的事务需处理。即刻遣散他们。”

languages.text: "Ich habe wichtigeres zu tun, als mir den Dank dieses Gesindels anzuhören. Schafft sie auf der Stelle weg."
languages.original_text: "I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe wichtigeres zu tun, als mir den Dank dieses Gesindels anzuhören. Schafft sie auf der Stelle weg."

languages.text: « J'ai mieux à faire que de recevoir les hommages de la populace. Embarquez-les immédiatement. »
languages.original_text: "I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai mieux à faire que de recevoir les hommages de la populace. Embarquez-les immédiatement. »

languages.text: «Tengo cosas mejores que hacer que aceptar la gratitud del populacho. Que se vayan ahora mismo».
languages.original_text: "I have more important matters to attend to than accepting the gratitude of the rabble. Remove them immediately."

traits.locale_text: «Tengo cosas mejores que hacer que aceptar la gratitud del populacho. Que se vayan ahora mismo».
